rationale.D1: Confirmed standard command-based with SubsystemBase subclasses (Intake, Shooter, Climber, Swerve) owning hardware directly via PIDSpark wrappers; no IO interfaces found (zero results for 'interface.*IO'), PIDSpark is a utility wrapper extending CANSparkBase not an abstraction layer with swappable impls.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command composition in RobotContainer with button bindings and named commands for PathPlanner autos; per-command State enums (Search/Found in CenterTargetCommand/CenterCommand) are local FSMs inside commands, not a centralized coordinator or Superstructure — this is L1 command composition.
rationale.D3: No simulationPeriodic, no WPILib physics classes (ElevatorSim/FlywheelSim/DCMotorSim), no maple-sim — confirmed zero simulation support.
rationale.D4: No src/test/java directory found and the wildlib SystemTestCommand/SystemTest framework is a hardware-mode test-mode helper (checks DriverStation.isTest()), not JUnit-based unit tests; no @Test annotations, no assertEquals calls.
rationale.D5: Confirmed SmartDashboard.putNumber/putBoolean scattered through Shooter, Intake, Climber, and Swerve periodic methods — dashboard values only; no AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or structured logging found.
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlannerLib fully wired: AutoBuilder.configureHolonomic in Swerve.java, NamedCommands.registerCommand for 7 named commands, 18 .auto files + ~57 .path files, and 15+ selectable autos in RobotContainer; no Choreo files or on-the-fly pathfinding.
rationale.D7: Confirmed Limelight subsystem used for tx/ty targeting servoing (CenterTargetCommand uses PID on limelight.getTX()/getTV()), and getBotPose2d_wpiBlue() is available but addVisionMeasurement is absent from Swerve.java which uses SwerveDriveOdometry not SwerveDrivePoseEstimator — this is targeting only, not pose estimation.
rationale.D8: Confirmed CI workflow (.github/workflows/gradle.yml) runs gradle build on push/PR; README is minimal (5 lines, no build/deploy instructions beyond contributing guidance); no spotless/checkstyle, no separate library repo — basic hygiene with CI but below L2.

D4: src/main/java/wildlib/testing/SystemTestCommand.java:1 — hardware test-mode framework, not JUnit; checks DriverStation.isTest()
src/main/java/wildlib/testing/SystemTest.java:1 — Shuffleboard-based system test runner, no @Test or assertEquals
D6: src/main/java/frc/robot/RobotContainer.java:159 — 15+ AutoBuilder.buildAuto calls with named competition autos
D7: src/main/java/frc/robot/commands/CenterTargetCommand.java:1 — PID on limelight.getTX() for rotational targeting
src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/Limelight.java:580 — getBotPose2d_wpiBlue() available but never called via addVisionMeasurement
